args.command: echo 'Step 1: Setup' && cd /tmp/task-composer-test && git checkout -b test-branch 2>/dev/null || git checkout test-branch && echo '{"status": "ready"}'
echo 'Step 2: Creating worktree' && cd /tmp/task-composer-test && git worktree add /tmp/worktrees/test -b test-worktree && ls -la /tmp/worktrees/ && echo '{"worktree": "/tmp/worktrees/test"}'

echo 'Step 4: Cleanup' && cd /tmp/task-composer-test && git worktree remove /tmp/worktrees/test --force && git branch -D test-worktree && git checkout main && git branch -D test-branch && rm -rf /tmp/worktrees && echo '{"cleaned": true}'
